title: thymus × citratus var. subcitratus
intro: Thymus × citratus var. subcitratus, also known as Lemon-scented Thyme, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the mint family and is native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues, wounds, and skin infections. The health benefits of Lemon-scented Thyme include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve digestion, while also acting as a natural insect repellent. Herbal preparations of Lemon-scented Thyme include teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be used to soothe coughs, calm the mind, and promote overall well-being.
